thesis: Arbiter is an edge filter, not a broad market screener.
summary: Polling-backed political setups lead the board, with only five ideas clearing the bar.
noTradePolicy: No trade today is a valid report when none of the current Kalshi prices clear the evidence bar.

opportunities.title: Democrats win the House in 2026
opportunities.reason: The generic ballot and district retirements still support a modest Democratic path.

evidenceLinks.label: RCP generic ballot average
evidenceLinks.note: Primary signal for the House control view.

evidenceLinks.label: Cook battleground retirement tracker
evidenceLinks.note: Tracks seat-level churn that supports the House setup.

opportunities.whatWouldChange: A Republican rebound in suburban district polling would neutralize the edge.

opportunities.title: Democrats win the Senate in 2026
opportunities.reason: The seat map is still live if the polling floor holds in the two toughest races.

evidenceLinks.label: RCP Senate race averages
evidenceLinks.note: Confirms that the hardest races remain competitive.

opportunities.whatWouldChange: A durable GOP lead in both tipping-point Senate races would move this back to pass.

opportunities.title: Fed cuts rates by the September 2026 meeting

market.title: Fed cuts rates by the September 2026 meeting

opportunities.reason: Cooling inflation and softer labor data still point to a cheaper cut path than Kalshi implies.

evidenceLinks.label: CME FedWatch path
evidenceLinks.note: Cross-checks the market-implied path against the report's fair value.

opportunities.whatWouldChange: A re-acceleration in core CPI would compress the edge quickly.

opportunities.title: Charles Leclerc podium at Monaco Grand Prix

market.title: Charles Leclerc podium at Monaco Grand Prix

opportunities.reason: Single-lap pace fits Monaco, but qualifying variance keeps this just below a stronger buy.

evidenceLinks.label: F1ReplayTiming Monaco pace notes
evidenceLinks.note: Provides single-lap and long-run pace context before qualifying.

opportunities.whatWouldChange: A grid penalty or practice fade would drop this below the watch bar.

opportunities.title: July CPI comes in below consensus

market.title: July CPI comes in below consensus

opportunities.reason: Shelter rollover is supportive, but the edge is still data-sensitive.

evidenceLinks.label: BLS CPI release calendar
evidenceLinks.note: Anchors the catalyst timing for the CPI setup.

opportunities.whatWouldChange: A commodity rebound or sticky services prints would move this back to pass.

portfolio.riskPosture: Concentrated in macro and election timing; avoid adding correlated rate exposure.

positions.title: Fed holds through June
positions.note: Still aligned with the base case; thesis review stays after the next CPI print.

evidenceLinks.label: BLS CPI release calendar
evidenceLinks.note: Keeps the review window tied to the next inflation print.

positions.title: WTI settles above $85 this month
positions.note: Crowded positioning and softer demand data argue for trimming before inventory numbers.

evidenceLinks.label: EIA weekly petroleum status report
evidenceLinks.note: Keeps the trim call tied to inventory risk.

positions.title: Verstappen wins next race
positions.note: Track-specific pace no longer supports the price; freeing capital is better than hoping for variance.

evidenceLinks.label: F1ReplayTiming Monaco pace notes
evidenceLinks.note: Shows the pace deterioration behind the exit call.

evidence.label: RCP generic ballot average
evidence.note: Primary input for the House 2026 market.

evidence.label: RCP Senate race averages
evidence.note: Primary input for the Senate control view.

evidence.label: CME FedWatch path
evidence.note: Cross-checks the market-implied path before assigning fair value.

evidence.label: F1ReplayTiming Monaco pace notes
evidence.note: Used for single-lap and long-run pace context before qualifying-sensitive trades.

pollingEvidence.trend_summary: Brown has held a narrow but steady lead across the latest RCP-tracked polls.

evidence_links.label: RCP Ohio Senate average
evidence_links.note: Primary polling average for the Ohio Senate general market.

pollingEvidence.trend_summary: Fleming still leads, but the field remains fragmented and plurality dynamics matter more than raw vote share.

evidence_links.label: RCP Louisiana GOP primary average
evidence_links.note: RCP table for the Louisiana Senate GOP primary.

archive.headline: Archived brief · Macro over motorsport
archive.summary: One rate-cut setup qualified. F1 stayed on watch after weak long-run pace.

archive.headline: Archived brief · No trade today
archive.summary: Nothing cleared the confidence threshold after spread and evidence review.

archive.headline: Archived brief · Portfolio cleanup
archive.summary: Focus shifted to an exit and one reduce call instead of new exposure.

watchlist: Pass thin-liquidity weather contracts until a model exists.
Wait on commodity-linked inflation markets until energy trend confirms.
Do not force a sixth idea if only five opportunities clear the bar.
